# workstream-fork (Antigravity)

Fork long sessions at **workstream phase boundaries**. Do not replay full chat — use context manifest SSOT.

## Command

Reference: `@workstream-fork` or run CLI from management-git root:

```bash
npx tsx maximus-ai/.system/plugins/workstream-fork/scripts/workstream-fork.mts --phase={A|B|C|D|E}
```

## Phases

A = Owner decisions · B = Stitch boards · C = Mockup→JSX · D = Screen impl · E = SSIM parity

Plan: `documentation-standards/docs/plans/PRIME-WORKSTREAM-FORK-40X-PLAN.md`
